i.title: Masterpiece
i.description: Represents a masterpiece of human creative genius.

ii.title: Interchange of values
ii.description: Shows an important interchange of human values over time or within a cultural area.

iii.title: Unique testimony
iii.description: Bears a unique or exceptional testimony to a cultural tradition or civilization.

iv.title: Architectural ensemble
iv.description: An outstanding example of a type of building, architectural or technological ensemble, or landscape illustrating a significant stage in human history.

v.title: Traditional human settlement
v.description: An outstanding example of traditional human settlement or land-use representative of a culture.

vi.title: Associative significance
vi.description: Directly associated with events, living traditions, ideas, beliefs, or artistic works of outstanding universal significance.

vii.title: Natural beauty
vii.description: Contains superlative natural phenomena or areas of exceptional natural beauty.

viii.title: Earth’s history
viii.description: Outstanding examples representing major stages of Earth’s history, including geological processes.

ix.title: Ecological processes
ix.description: Outstanding examples representing significant ongoing ecological and biological processes.

x.title: Biodiversity
x.description: Contains important natural habitats for in-situ conservation of biological diversity.
